data.title: US Futures Edge Higher, Nikkei Surges 8% As Trump's 90-Day Tariff Pause Triggers Historic Rally, Analyst Warns 'We're Not Out Of The Woods Yet'
data.description: U.S. stock futures edged higher on Wednesday evening following President Donald Trump's unexpected 90-day reprieve on reciprocal tariffs that triggered Wall Street's strongest rally since 2008.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Says 26 Years Ago Warren Buffett's Amazon Caution Cost Him Millions: Former Trump Official Sees Today's AI Hype As History Repeating
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci shared how Warren Buffett's caution in 1999 led him to miss out on millions in Amazon stock, and how he believes the current skepticism surrounding AI mirrors that same missed opportunity.

data.title: Dave Ramsey Reveals One Trait Among Successful Financial Transformations: 'Few People Have The Courage To Seek Out Change'
Kevin O'Leary Isn't Satisfied With Trump Raising China Tariffs To 125%: The Shark Says, 'This Isn't About Politics, It's About Fairness'
data.description: Kevin O'Leary slammed China for decades of unfair trade practices and reiterated his call for a 400% tariff, arguing the U.S. must get tougher to protect its innovation and leverage its economic power.

data.title: Musk's xAI Aims For 1 Million GPUs In Memphis—But Can The City's Grid Handle A $27B AI Power Surge?
